name: Loft18 Baton Rouge
about: Loft18 Baton Rouge is an interactive sports bar and grill designed for year-round, all-weather golf and multi-sport action. The venue features custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays that deliver precision play for golfers of all experience levels. Beyond golf, it offers a casual environment for socializing and networking, with a full-service restaurant and bar serving gastro-pub fare, craft beer, and cocktails. The atmosphere is described as easy-going and welcoming, blending sports entertainment with hospitality. Loft18 operates with a 'sip, sport, socialize' philosophy, catering to both serious golfers and those seeking a relaxed social venue.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Golf simulation bays featuring championship courses
Multi-sport simulator technology available for various activities
Gastro-pub fare and full-service bar enhances the social experience
Year-round, all-weather facility for consistent play
League play and tournaments for competitive golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with gastro-pub fare, featuring a culinary canvas that is ever-changing and tailored to tantalize the palate. They have strong bonds with local suppliers to ensure top-notch ingredients.
Full-service bar offering craft beer, cocktails, and a selection of drinks. The 'only-in-New Orleans' style of easy-going service and hospitality is emphasized.

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays feature games and championship courses.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether they provide club rentals. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for this information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, Loft18 operates a full-service restaurant and bar, offering gastro-pub fare, craft beer, and cocktails. The venue encourages guests to dine and drink on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website content does not provide specific information on the time required to play 18 holes. This can vary depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is Loft18 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, offering a casual sports bar and restaurant atmosphere that can accommodate families.
